<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/companies/{company_id}/payrolls/{id}/partner_disbursements"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get partner disbursements for a specific payroll.

scope: `partner_disbursements:read`
